tasks.label: Run platform API local
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; $script = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/control-plane-api/scripts/run_platform_api_local.ps1'; if (-not (Test-Path $script)) { throw 'apps/control-plane-api is not present under the repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; Set-Location $repoRoot; & $script

tasks.label: Restart platform API local
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; $script = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/control-plane-api/scripts/run_platform_api_local.ps1'; if (-not (Test-Path $script)) { throw 'apps/control-plane-api is not present under the repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; Set-Location $repoRoot; & $script -Restart

tasks.label: Forms engine smoke
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'packages/forms-engine/src'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'packages/forms-engine is not present under the repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; $env:PYTHONPATH='packages/forms-engine/src'; & '${workspaceFolder}\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -m apex_forms_engine.smoke

tasks.label: Forms engine tests
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'packages/forms-engine/tests'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'packages/forms-engine is not present under the repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; $env:PYTHONPATH='packages/forms-engine/src'; & '${workspaceFolder}\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -m pytest packages/forms-engine/tests -q

tasks.label: Forms engine clean artifacts
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; $artifacts = Join-Path $repoRoot 'packages/forms-engine/src/apex_forms_engine/artifacts'; if (-not (Test-Path $artifacts)) { throw 'packages/forms-engine artifacts are not present under the repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; Get-ChildItem -Path (Join-Path $artifacts '*') -Exclude '.gitignore' | Remove-Item -Force

tasks.label: Forms engine compile
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; $src = Join-Path $repoRoot 'packages/forms-engine/src'; if (-not (Test-Path $src)) { throw 'packages/forms-engine is not present under the repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; & '${workspaceFolder}\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -m compileall packages/forms-engine/src packages/forms-engine/tests

tasks.label: Run mutation seam local
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/mutation-seam'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'apps/mutation-seam is not present under the repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; Set-Location $lane; & '${workspaceFolder}\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8000

tasks.label: Run operations web local
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/operations-web'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'apps/operations-web is not present under the repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; corepack pnpm --dir $repoRoot --filter '@apex/operations-web' dev

tasks.label: Operations web typecheck
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/operations-web'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'apps/operations-web is not present under the repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; corepack pnpm --dir $repoRoot --filter '@apex/operations-web' typecheck

tasks.label: Operations web browser smoke
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/operations-web'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'apps/operations-web is not present under the repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; corepack pnpm --dir $repoRoot --filter '@apex/operations-web' smoke:browser

tasks.label: Operations web PM live-data smoke
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/operations-web'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'apps/operations-web is not present under the repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; corepack pnpm --dir $repoRoot --filter '@apex/operations-web' smoke:pm-live-data -- --operations-web-base-url http://127.0.0.1:3000 --mutation-seam-base-url http://127.0.0.1:8000

tasks.label: Operations web promoted-host smoke
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/operations-web'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'apps/operations-web is not present under the repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; $env:OPERATIONS_WEB_CONTROL_PLANE_BASE_URL='https://control.apexpowerops.com'; corepack pnpm --dir $repoRoot --filter '@apex/operations-web' smoke:promoted-host

tasks.label: Olares hold-boundary cadence check
args: $script = Join-Path '${workspaceFolder}' 'tools/ai/run-olares-hold-boundary-check.ps1'; if (-not (Test-Path $script)) { throw 'tools/ai/run-olares-hold-boundary-check.ps1 is not present under the platform workspace root.' }; Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}'; & $script

tasks.label: Stage named platform paths
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; $raw = $env:APEX_PLATFORM_GIT_PATHSPEC; if (-not $raw) { throw 'Set APEX_PLATFORM_GIT_PATHSPEC to one or more semicolon-delimited repo-relative paths before running this task.' }; $paths = $raw -split ';' | ForEach-Object { $_.Trim() } | Where-Object { $_ }; if (-not $paths) { throw 'APEX_PLATFORM_GIT_PATHSPEC did not contain any usable paths.' }; $invalid = $paths | Where-Object { $_ -match '^(?:[A-Za-z]:|/|\)' -or $_ -like '..*' }; if ($invalid) { throw ('All staged paths must be repo-relative. Invalid: ' + ($invalid -join ', ')) }; Set-Location $repoRoot; git add -- @paths

tasks.label: Historical parent-root bootstrap packet staged diff
Preview historical parent-root Class A scaffold packet

Historical parent-root Class A scaffold packet staged diff
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; Set-Location $repoRoot; git diff --cached -- .github .gitignore AGENTS.md package.json pnpm-lock.yaml pnpm-workspace.yaml pyproject.toml apps/control-plane-api apps/operations-web apps/mutation-seam packages/forms-engine packages/calc-engine tests/test_fixture_contract_020f.py

tasks.label: Parent-root package source packet staged diff
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; Set-Location $repoRoot; git diff --cached -- packages/forms-engine/src packages/forms-engine/tests packages/calc-engine/src packages/calc-engine/tests

tasks.label: Parent-root operations-web runtime packet staged diff
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; Set-Location $repoRoot; git diff --cached -- apps/operations-web/DEPLOYMENT_VALIDATION.md apps/operations-web/app apps/operations-web/lib apps/operations-web/next-env.d.ts apps/operations-web/public apps/operations-web/scripts apps/operations-web/tests

tasks.label: Parent-root mutation-seam runtime packet staged diff
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; Set-Location $repoRoot; git diff --cached -- apps/mutation-seam/app apps/mutation-seam/migrations apps/mutation-seam/run_persisted_validation.py apps/mutation-seam/run_schedule_bootstrap.py apps/mutation-seam/test_store.py apps/mutation-seam/tests apps/mutation-seam/validate.py

tasks.label: Parent-root control-plane core packet staged diff
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; Set-Location $repoRoot; git diff --cached -- apps/control-plane-api/config.py apps/control-plane-api/main.py apps/control-plane-api/demo apps/control-plane-api/docs/contracts/CHATGPT-REMOTE-CONTROL-PLANE-TOOL-SCHEMAS-2026-03-28.json apps/control-plane-api/models apps/control-plane-api/services apps/control-plane-api/scripts/smoke_deployed_control_plane.py apps/control-plane-api/tests/__init__.py apps/control-plane-api/tests/test_control_plane.py apps/control-plane-api/tests/test_github_mcp_transport.py apps/control-plane-api/tests/test_health.py apps/control-plane-api/tests/test_mcp_transport.py apps/control-plane-api/tests/test_oauth_consent_route.py apps/control-plane-api/tests/test_smoke_deployed_control_plane.py apps/control-plane-api/tests/test_supabase_mcp_transport.py

tasks.label: Parent-root control-plane support packet staged diff
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; Set-Location $repoRoot; git diff --cached -- apps/control-plane-api/_invariant_probe_019g.py apps/control-plane-api/api apps/control-plane-api/DEPLOYMENT_VALIDATION.md apps/control-plane-api/migrations apps/control-plane-api/PUBLIC-APPARATUS-ROUTE-PROMOTION-CHECKLIST-2026-04-21.md apps/control-plane-api/scripts apps/control-plane-api/supabase apps/control-plane-api/utils

Run mutation seam local
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/mutation-seam'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'apps/mutation-seam is not present under the repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; Set-Location $lane; & '${workspaceFolder}\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -m uvicorn app.main:app --reload --port 8000

tasks.label: Mutation seam tests
args: $repoRoot = (Resolve-Path '${workspaceFolder}').Path; $lane = Join-Path $repoRoot 'apps/mutation-seam'; if (-not (Test-Path $lane)) { throw 'apps/mutation-seam is not present under the repo root for this bootstrap packet.' }; Set-Location $lane; $env:SEAM_STORE_BACKEND='memory'; & '${workspaceFolder}\.venv\Scripts\python.exe' -m pytest tests/ -v
